components.name: ammonium chloride
components.concentration: 1 g/L (physical MM); NH4+ set to 100 mmol/gDW (simulation flux bound)
components.evidence: The minimal medium medium (MM) consisted of 1 g/L NaCl, 1 g/L NH4Cl, 1.5 g/L K2HPO4, 0.5 g/L KH2PO4, and 0.2 g/L MgSO4 7H2O. [Supplementary Method 1. Media] Main text: 'the essential nitrogen source (NH4+) which was set to 100 mmol/gDW'.

components.name: oxygen
components.concentration: EX_o2_e open (aerobic; simulation flux bound 1000 mmol/gDW)
components.evidence: All flasks were incubated aerobically at 30 C... incubated at 30 C with shaking at 180 rpm. Main text: 'the contents of all other inorganic substances without carbon (C) or nitrogen (N) were set to 1000 mmol/gDW' (includes O2 for the aerobic models).

media.base_medium: Minimal (mineral salts) medium MM: 1 g/L NaCl, 1 g/L NH4Cl, 1.5 g/L K2HPO4, 0.5 g/L KH2PO4, 0.2 g/L MgSO4·7H2O (Supplementary Method 1). In-silico for the SuperCC/GSMM C=4 condition, supplemented with 25 mmol/gDW each of glucose, citrate, acetate, and fumarate.

sources_chased.what: Base physical MM recipe (referenced as Supplementary Methods / Media section)
sources_chased.how: Downloaded EuropePMC supplementaryFiles zip -> 41467_2025_67953_MOESM1_ESM.pdf (Supplementary Information), extracted 'Supplementary Method 1. Media'
added: KH2PO4 0.5 g/L (monopotassium phosphate, previously folded into dipotassium phosphate)
confirmed MM contains NO trace-elements solution and NO vitamins

missing_before: monopotassium phosphate (KH2PO4, the second/acidic phosphate buffer salt — only dipotassium phosphate was represented before)
media.notes: Complete recipe recovered from the paper's own Supplementary Method 1 (Media). The physical MM is a bare mineral-salts medium (NaCl, NH4Cl, K2HPO4, KH2PO4, MgSO4·7H2O) with NO trace-element mix, NO vitamins, NO added carbon in the base — distinct from the EM/DM media in the same paper, which DO carry a 1 mL/L trace-elements solution (FeSO4, MgSO4, CoCl2, ZnSO4, MnCl2, CuSO4, EDTA). The current exchange set was already chemically complete at the ion level (Na, Cl, K, pi, Mg, SO4, NH4, O2 + 4 carbons); this curation adds the actual salt identities/concentrations, splits phosphate into K2HPO4+KH2PO4, and confirms the true absence of trace metals and vitamins. Carbon-source concentrations (25 mmol/gDW each) and NH4+ (100 mmol/gDW) are in-silico flux bounds for the SuperCC C=4 simulation, not solution molarities, so concentration_mM is null for those.
